Class JasperPdfExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.JasperPdfExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExporter, JasperIPdfExporter, Serializable
public class JasperPdfExporter extends AbstractJasperExporter implements JasperIPdfExporter

JasperPdfExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
See Also:
